introduction: This presentation outlines the financial implications of our recently renegotiated leases. We will delve into our cost-saving measures and their impact on our bottom line.

subsections.heading: Context: Retail Industry Lease Trends
subsections.content:
• Overall, the retail industry saw a 3% decrease in lease costs in 2025
• In Richmond, lease costs remained stable due to economic growth
• Q1 2025 marked an increase in lease renegotiations across the retail sector
• E-commerce growth has influenced changes in lease agreements
• More retailers are exploring short-term leases to increase flexibility
• Some retailers have negotiated for percentage rent leases, where rent is based on store sales
subsections.justification: This slide discusses general industry trends and regional data, but does not directly address Lee's Market's specific lease renegotiations.

subsections.heading: Impact of Lease Renegotiations on Lee's Market
subsections.content:
• The renegotiations impacted twelve store locations
• Lease renegotiations led to changes in store operating hours
• The lease renegotiations were managed by the company's legal and finance departments
• The renegotiations allowed for more flexible terms in the face of volatile market conditions
• The company's ability to renegotiate leases was influenced by its strong market presence and store performance
subsections.justification: This slide focuses on the impact and related aspects of lease renegotiations, not on the specific rent reduction rates.

subsections.heading: Future Lease Management Strategies
subsections.content:
• Lee's Market plans to evaluate lease agreements on an annual basis
• The company is considering incorporating more percentage rent leases in the future
• Lee's Market is exploring opportunities for further lease renegotiations
• Future lease management will focus on flexible terms to adapt to market changes
• The company will prioritize locations with high sales performance for future lease negotiations
subsections.justification: The slide discusses future strategies, which do not provide any information about the average rent reduction from past renegotiations.

conclusion: Our strategic lease renegotiations have yielded considerable rent reductions across our locations. Moving forward, we need to continuously review and manage our lease agreements to maximize savings.

image_queries.slide_title: Impact of Lease Renegotiations on Lee's Market
